parameters.description: Integer array, where entry i specifies the number of elements to send to rank i.
parameters.name: sendcounts

parameters.description: Integer array, where entry i specifies the displacement (in bytes, offset from *sendbuf) from which to send data to rank i.*
parameters.name: sdispls

parameters.description: Datatype array, where entry i specifies the datatype to use when sending data to rank i.
parameters.name: sendtypes

parameters.description: Address of receive buffer.
parameters.name: recvbuf

parameters.description: Integer array, where entry j specifies the number of elements to receive from rank j.
parameters.name: recvcounts

parameters.description: Integer array, where entry j specifies the displacement (in bytes, offset from *recvbuf) to which data from rank j should* be written.
parameters.name: rdispls

parameters.description: Datatype array, where entry j specifies the datatype to use when receiving data from rank j.
parameters.name: recvtypes

parameters.description: Communicator over which data is to be exchanged.
parameters.name: comm
